name: Pineapple Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the mold you are going to use in cold water and set aside.
2. Mix gelatin with 1/2 cup water and set aside.
3. Heat pineapple and cream cheese until dissolved (do not boil). Add gelatin and stir.
4. Cool the mixture.
5. Whip the heavy cream, but not too stiff, and add 1 tsp sugar and vanilla.
6. When the pineapple mixture is cool, stir in the remaining ingredients.
7. Put into the prepared mold and refrigerate overnight.
8. Unmold and decorate with half-cherries. Refrigerate.
